### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] feat: added passthrough support
summary:
## Summary

This PR adds comprehensive batch delete functionality and passthrough support across all providers, along with an in-memory KV store for transport-level protocol coordination. It also enhances the GenAI integration with improved batch operations, file handling, and provider detection.

#

title: [PR] feat: Use local LLM (Ollama) for bulk session pre-filtering before cloud LLM analysis (#290)
summary:
## Summary

- Implements two-tier LLM architecture for bulk session processing: local Ollama model pre-filters sessions, cloud LLM only processes flagged-as-interesting sessions
- New `services/session-pre-filter.ts` service with `preFilterSessions()` — classifies each session JSONL file using a loc

title: [PR] feat: add official DeepL provider with native batching
summary:
## Summary
- add official `deepl` as a pure translation provider alongside `deeplx`
- implement an official DeepL adapter with API key based endpoint detection and native `text[]` batching
- route official DeepL through the batch queue while keeping `deeplx` on the existing single-request path

title: [PR] feat(core): add GEMINI_API_BASE_URL env var for custom API endpoints
summary:
## Summary

This PR adds support for a `GEMINI_API_BASE_URL` environment variable that allows users to override the default Gemini API endpoint. This enables using the CLI as a frontend for local-first workflows with OpenAI-compatible proxies like Ollama and LiteLLM.

## Details

- **New Environment
